name: human-approval-gate
description: Use when you are about to perform a destructive or high-risk action (like applying DB migrations or deploying) and need human approval.
---

# Human Approval Gate

## Guidance
1. Summarize the destructive action you are about to take.
2. Clearly ask the user for explicit approval (e.g., "Please reply YES to proceed").
3. Do NOT proceed until the user has explicitly approved.
